stack_bottom_to_top.role: finely traced drone bodies plus clean translucent searchlight cones
clean procedural atmosphere with no copied city fragments
illuminated pixels and compact glow only; signs remain in base

notes: Every PNG layer is 3840x2160 and uses the same origin; do not crop individual assets.
preview_extended_exact.png is the canonical 4K visual preview and contains the complete original at exact 2x scale, offset 334,88.
Before final 2x upscaling, the embedded 1586x992 original is verified pixel-exact at logical offset 167,44.
The outer border is content-aware outpainting that continues the buildings, pipes, sky, rain and rooftop; the protected center is the unchanged original.
The base's removed-building fill is intended for modest parallax and neon-off states; large reveals may require artist-directed inpainting.
Other illuminated signs are provided as optional effect overlays and intentionally remain visible in the base scene.
Transparent mattes were checked on both black and white backgrounds; see edge_qa_sheet.png and edge_qa_drones.png.
